mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, real_name, role, student_id, college, major, grade, phone, email, avatar, resume, lab_id, can_edit, create_time, update_time, status, deleted FROM t_user WHERE role = #{role} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, username, password, real_name, role, student_id, college, major, grade, phone, email, avatar, resume, lab_id, can_edit, create_time, update_time, status, deleted FROM t_user WHERE role = 'admin' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.role, u.student_id, u.college, u.major, u.grade, u.phone, u.email, u.avatar, u.resume, u.lab_id, u.can_edit, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.status, u.deleted, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.audit_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.audit_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS approved_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.audit_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejected_count FROM t_user u LEFT JOIN t_delivery d ON d.user_id = u.id AND d.deleted = 0
AND d.lab_id = #{labId}
WHERE u.role = 'student' AND u.deleted = 0
AND ( u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND u.student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentId}, '%')
AND u.major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{major}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_delivery dx WHERE dx.user_id = u.id AND dx.lab_id = #{labId} AND dx.deleted = 0 )
GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.role, u.student_id, u.college, u.major, u.grade, u.phone, u.email, u.avatar, u.resume, u.lab_id, u.can_edit, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.status, u.deleted ORDER BY
MAX(d.delivery_time) DESC,
u.create_time DESC,
u.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_user u WHERE u.role = 'student' AND u.deleted = 0
AND ( u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND u.student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentId}, '%')
AND u.major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{major}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_delivery dx WHERE dx.user_id = u.id AND dx.lab_id = #{labId} AND dx.deleted = 0 )

SELECT id, username, password, real_name, role, student_id, college, major, grade, phone, email, avatar, resume, lab_id, can_edit, create_time, update_time, status, deleted FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = #{deleted}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, real_name = #{realName}, role = #{role}, student_id = #{studentId}, college = #{college}, major = #{major}, grade = #{grade}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, deleted = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
